name: Luxury Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 2 cans herbed tomato sauce (1 lb each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onion and garlic in oil in a Dutch oven until tender.
2. Add chicken livers and sauté until browned.
3. Add remaining ingredients (except last 4) to the pot. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer, stirring occasionally for 25 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, cook and drain lasagna very well. Rinse with cold water to make separation easier while working and drain again.
5. Pour a little sauce into a 16 x 9-1/2 x 2-1/2" baking dish (or two similar small dishes).
6. Top with a layer of lasagna, spread with a third of the ricotta, and sprinkle with a third of the Parmesan.
7. Repeat layers twice.
8. Arrange mozzarella slices on top and bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 30 minutes or until bubbly. Serves 8-10.
